subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Truly thou art firm and steadfast, eloquent and knowledgeable. Thy letter dated the fourteenth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان فی الحقیقه ثابت و راسخی و ناطق و واقف نامه که به تاریخ چهاردهم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
